prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年电子科技大学在甘肃省理科（物理类）最低录取位次分别为约1511名、1533名、1298名、1218名、1536名。2023–2024年位次曾明显前移至1298和1218，但2025年大幅后移至1536，近两年累计后移约318名，波动较大，2025年基准位次约1536名；该校在甘肃省理科（物理类）招生计划：2021年83人、2022年85人、2023年87人、2024年85人、2025年86人，基本稳定在83–87人区间；2026年计划大幅扩招至123人，较2025年增加37人、增幅约43%，扩招幅度显著，理论上会拉低录取门槛（位次数字增大）。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 电子科技大学为985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年主榜第33名，近年排名稳定在28–33名区间，属于国内顶尖理工类高校；2026年高考周期声誉评价为偏负面，涉及学校管理回应及师德师风事件（学生困难认定争议、副教授不当言论停课），可能对报考心理产生轻微抑制；抖音热度为较热（总排名第33，综合热度约134万），短视频曝光度较高，反映一定关注度；2022年曾出现投档线异常信号（被关注为黑马），但未见持续断档记录；信息与通信工程A+、电子科学与技术A+、计算机科学与技术A、仪器科学与技术A-、光学工程A-、管理科学与工程A-，共6个A类学科，在电子信息领域具有顶尖学科实力，对高分考生吸引力强。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 电子信息/通信类专业2024年高热推荐，计算机类推荐，电气工程及其自动化高热推荐，与该校优势学科高度契合，报考热度较高；甘肃省2026年普通高考总人数约21.87万，较2025年（约18万）明显增加，按历史比例估算物理类考生约14.76万，较2025年（12.14万）增加约21.5%，竞争加剧；电子科技大学位于四川成都，非甘肃本省高校；该校在甘肃招生人数占比较小（2025年约1.17%），属跨省招生，地域偏好影响有限。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次1536名、2026年计划大幅扩招43%（拉低门槛）、甘肃省物理类考生增加约21.5%（加剧竞争）、声誉偏负面（轻微抑制）、电子信息类专业热度高（增强吸引力）等因素，扩招效应显著但考生增量部分抵消，预计2026年最低录取位次较2025年有所后移（位次数字增大），预测最低位次约1902名，区间1616–2188名。

一档（最难进）
- 计算机类（计算机科学与技术、人工智能、数据科学与大数据技术、网络空间安全）
- 电子信息类（信息与通信）（通信工程、电子信息工程、网络工程等）

- 电子信息类（光电集成与光网络）（光电信息科学与工程、信息工程）
- 工科试验班（机器人、电气信息、智能制造）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间（1616–2188名）内，建议以二档专业为主攻方向、一档王牌专业冲刺、三档专业保底。若位次明显优于区间下限（如接近1616名），可重点冲击计算机类、电子信息类（信息与通信）等A+学科专业；若位次接近区间上限（2188名），建议优先选择二档中电子工程类、微电子等专业，同时以三档专业稳妥保底。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for UESTC in Gansu Province's science (physics category) were approximately 1511, 1533, 1298, 1218, and 1536 respectively. Rankings notably moved forward to 1298 and 1218 in 2023–2024, but significantly moved back to 1536 in 2025, with a cumulative backward shift of about 318 positions over the past two years, showing considerable fluctuation. The 2025 baseline ranking is approximately 1536. The enrollment plan for UESTC in Gansu's science (physics category) was: 83 in 2021, 85 in 2022, 87 in 2023, 85 in 2024, and 86 in 2025, remaining stable in the 83–87 range. In 2026, the plan significantly expands to 123, an increase of 37 students (about 43%) compared to 2025, which theoretically lowers the admission threshold (ranking number increases).

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: UESTC is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university. In the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, it ranks 33rd on the main list, with stable rankings in the 28–33 range in recent years, belonging to top-tier science and engineering universities in China. The reputation evaluation for the 2026 college entrance examination cycle is slightly negative, involving incidents related to school management responses and teacher ethics (student hardship identification controversy, inappropriate remarks by an associate professor leading to class suspension), which may mildly suppress application psychology. On Douyin, it is relatively hot (ranked 33rd overall, with a comprehensive heat of about 1.34 million), indicating high short-video exposure and certain attention. In 2022, there was an abnormal signal in the admission cutoff line (noted as a dark horse), but no sustained cutoff gaps have been recorded. It has 6 A-level disciplines: Information and Communication Engineering (A+), Electronic Science and Technology (A+), Computer Science and Technology (A), Instrument Science and Technology (A-), Optical Engineering (A-), and Management Science and Engineering (A-), with top-tier disciplinary strength in the electronic information field, strongly attracting high-scoring candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Electronic information/communication majors are highly recommended in 2024, computer majors are recommended, and electrical engineering and automation are highly recommended, highly aligned with the university's advantageous disciplines, leading to high application popularity. The total number of regular college entrance examination takers in Gansu Province in 2026 is approximately 218,700, a significant increase from about 180,000 in 2025. Estimated by historical proportion, physics category candidates are about 147,600, an increase of about 21.5% from 121,400 in 2025, intensifying competition. UESTC is located in Chengdu, Sichuan, not a local university in Gansu. Its enrollment proportion in Gansu is small (about 1.17% in 2025), making it a cross-provincial enrollment, with limited regional preference impact.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 1536, the significant 43% enrollment expansion in 2026 (lowering the threshold), the approximately 21.5% increase in physics category candidates in Gansu (intensifying competition), the slightly negative reputation (mild suppression), and the high popularity of electronic information majors (enhancing attractiveness), the expansion effect is significant but partially offset by the increase in candidates. It is predicted that the minimum admission ranking in 2026 will shift backward compared to 2025 (ranking number increases), with a predicted minimum ranking of approximately 1902, and a range of 1616–2188.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Computer Category (Computer Science and Technology, Artificial Intelligence, Data Science and Big Data Technology, Cyberspace Security)
- Electronic Information Category (Information and Communication) (Communication Engineering, Electronic Information Engineering, Network Engineering, etc.)
- Integrated Circuit Design and Integrated Systems (National Demonstration Microelectronics College).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Electronic Engineering Category) (Electronic Science and Technology, Electromagnetic Field and Wireless Technology)
- Microelectronics Science and Engineering
- Electronic Information Category (Optoelectronic Integration and Optical Networks) (Optoelectronic Information Science and Engineering, Information Engineering)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Robotics, Electrical Information, Intelligent Manufacturing).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Electronic Information Category (Intelligent Instruments, Intelligent Control) (Automation, Measurement and Control Technology and Instruments)
- Mathematics Category (Big Data and Intelligent Decision-Making, Mathematics and Applications, Computational Science)
- Biomedical Engineering Category (Medical-Engineering Intersection, Information Biology and Genetic Engineering)
- Engineering Experimental Class (New Materials, New Energy and Electronic Chemistry).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range (1616–2188), it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main direction, sprint for Tier 1 flagship majors, and use Tier 3 majors as safety options. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., close to 1616), you can focus on sprinting for A+ discipline majors such as Computer Category and Electronic Information Category (Information and Communication). If your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (2188), it is recommended to prioritize Tier 2 majors like Electronic Engineering Category and Microelectronics, while safely securing Tier 3 majors.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for the University of Electronic Science and Technology of China in Gansu Province's liberal arts (history category) were approximately 1003, 766, 723, 792, and 1049 respectively. Rankings moved forward continuously from 2021 to 2023 to 723, slightly moved back to 792 in 2024, and significantly moved back to 1049 in 2025, with a cumulative backward shift of about 257 positions over the past two years. The baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 1049. The university's enrollment plan in Gansu Province for liberal arts (history category) was: 5 students in 2021, 5 in 2022, 4 in 2023, 6 in 2024, and 5 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 5 students, unchanged from 2025, with no expansion or reduction.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: The University of Electronic Science and Technology of China is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class construction university. It ranks 33rd in the main list of the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, belonging to top domestic science and engineering universities, but liberal arts are not its strong area. The reputation evaluation during the 2026 college entrance examination cycle is somewhat negative, involving school management and teacher ethics incidents, which may have a slight inhibitory effect on application psychology. It has a relatively hot presence on Douyin (total ranking 33rd), with a certain level of attention. The university only offers a Social Science Experimental Class (compound cultivation of public management and law) and Foreign Languages and Literature categories in liberal arts, with no corresponding A-class discipline evaluations, and its liberal arts strength is relatively weak.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law majors showed differentiation and wait-and-see in 2024, foreign language majors generally wait-and-see, and liberal arts majors overall have average popularity. The total number of regular college entrance examination candidates in Gansu Province in 2026 is approximately 218,700, with an estimated 71,100 history category candidates based on historical proportions, an increase of about 21.8% compared to 2025 (58,400), intensifying competition. The University of Electronic Science and Technology of China is located in Chengdu, Sichuan, not a local university in Gansu Province, with very few liberal arts admissions (only 4–6 students per year), belonging to cross-provincial enrollment, with limited regional preference influence.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 1049, the unchanged 2026 enrollment plan, the approximately 21.8% increase in history category candidates in Gansu Province (intensified competition), the somewhat negative reputation (slight inhibition), and the average popularity of liberal arts majors, under the background of increased candidates but unchanged plan, it is expected that the minimum admission ranking in 2026 will slightly move back (ranking number increases) compared to 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 1074, with a range of 913 to 1235.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult)
- Social Science Experimental Class (Administrative Management, Urban Management, Law) (Compound Talent Cultivation in Public Management and Law).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy)
- Foreign Languages and Literature (English, Japanese, French) (AI Cross-Disciplinary Composite Innovative Talent Dual Degree Cultivation Plan).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: The University of Electronic Science and Technology of China only admits two majors in liberal arts in Gansu, with very few students (5 in total). If the ranking is within the predicted range (913–1235), and significantly better than the lower limit (e.g., close to 913), one can aim for the Social Science Experimental Class; if the ranking is close to the upper limit (1235), the Foreign Languages and Literature category is a safe choice. It is recommended that liberal arts candidates also consider more major options at other comprehensive 985 universities.
